cards.back: A method of requirements modeling that involves describing the interactions between actors and system components to model business processes and requirements

cards.front: What is UML Model for Use Case?
cards.back: A class diagram that shows the structure of classes, objects, and their interactions to support requirements modeling and analysis

cards.front: What does UML use to model classes and objects?
cards.back: Class diagrams, object diagrams, and state machine diagrams

cards.front: What is the main goal of Requirements Analysis?
cards.back: To identify, document, and verify the functional and non-functional requirements of a software system

cards.front: What is the purpose of Use Case Diagrams?
cards.back: To model and organize the interactions between actors and system components to identify and describe functional requirements
